_description: FLUX.2-dev prompts for wiki detail images. BG3-style stylized fantasy art, 512x512. Generated PNGs go to gs://atlas-bound-data/<category>/<slug>.png to match the getXxxImageUrl helpers in client/src/utils/compendiumIcons.ts.
_style_suffix: , Baldur's Gate 3 style stylized fantasy concept art, dark moody lighting, rich colors, rim light, painterly, cinematic, 4k, highly detailed
_negative_inline: (avoid text, watermarks, signatures, logos, extra limbs, deformed anatomy, blurriness, lowres)
